title: 01675_Difference_of_submodular_minimization_via_DC_programming
positive_examples: The proposed algorithms outperform existing baselines on applications such as speech corpus selection and feature selection, which can enhance machine learning applications in speech recognition and data analysis.

The work contributes to the field of machine learning by providing efficient algorithms for minimizing the difference of submodular functions, which can lead to better decision-making processes in various applications.
